owned_files.notes: 67 .rs files across 41 modules. Top-level: aging, astronomy, atmosphere (470), creative_arts, disasters (455), docking, ecology (259), electrical, fire, food (189), genetics, geology, governance, hvac, hydrology (420), interaction, manufacturing, medical, oceanography, offline, player (140), plumbing, psychology (144), time (186), transportation, waste, weather (353). Sub-dirs: ai/, combat/, construction/, crafting/, economy/, farming/, inventory/, logistics/, navigation/, quests/, skills/, vehicles/.
3 .rs files: components.rs (191 LOC, 20 components), systems.rs (47 LOC, System trait + SystemRunner), mod.rs (17 LOC, GameWorld wrapper around hecs::World).

gaps: About 20 systems are 47-52 LOC scaffolds with TODO bodies (aging, astronomy, creative_arts, docking, fire, genetics, geology, governance, hvac, manufacturing, medical, oceanography, offline, plumbing, transportation, waste)
Combat: damage type / armor / resistance not applied; death (loot drop, animation, respawn) not triggered
Economy: passive_income_per_day not credited to player wallets
Electrical: lacks dedicated PowerGenerator / PowerConsumer ECS components — falls back to Interactable scan
Food: FoodSpoilage component missing; spoiled-food substitution not implemented
Psychology: needs a Needs ECS component instead of side state
Inventory containers, navigation orbital (Kepler solver), skills learning curve, farming automation, ai/autonomy snapshot, construction CSG all carry TODOs
Several systems referenced by mod.rs with implementations of substance: weather, hydrology, atmosphere, disasters, ecology, food, time, player, interaction, psychology

summary: ECS framework + System trait shipped; 41 system modules registered. Roughly half (especially the recently-added domain systems) are scaffolds with TODO tick bodies. Combat, economy, logistics, electrical, food, psychology all flagged for fill-in — registry active status is accurate.
